data.name: Holstaur Milk Ranch
data.detailed_description:
Manage a unique and lively ranch where your main responsibility is to care for a herd of Holstaur girls. Keep them happy, well-fed, and growing strong—because the healthier they are and the better well-developed their breasts are, the higher the quality milk (and other products) they’ll produce for you to sell.

Balance your time and resources carefully! Upgrade your food supplies to support the growth of your herd, or invest in stronger defenses to protect them from the local wildlife. Be vigilant though, as wild creatures will attempt to invade the ranch and breed with your Holstaurs.

As your operation grows, use your profits to pay off the debts of neighboring ranches, unlock special monster girl companions with unique abilities, and discover new ways to streamline and expand your ranching empire.

There's a lot more coming—new features, new characters, and even more ways to build the ultimate monster girl ranch!

Gameplay Features

Strategic Ranch Management: Keep your herd fed, content, and productive through real-time resource management. Keep them fed and harvest their produce before it expires!

Collect and Trade: Sell your ranch’s products to fund expansions and unlock special upgrades. Unlock different kinds of sellable products as you advance!

Upgrade and Expand: Improve your food type, defenses, and other ranch facilities as you earn profits.

Defend Your Herd: Protect your Holstaurs from invading wildlife who attempt to breed with them, in fast-paced defense segments. (Your Holstaur willingly engage with any advances, but they will run away to join the Wildlife that breeds with them if successful, you can shoot them to prevent this!)

Replayable Simulation: Experiment with different management styles and strategies to build your ultimate monster-girl ranch!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 or DirectX 12 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
